description: Hand-labelled eval set: human transcripts of hard pages (degraded scans, handwriting) that carry no born-digital ground truth. Copy this file to labelset.json, then fill in the matching .txt transcripts. `page` is a 0-BASED index; `pdf` resolves from the dir you run the eval in; `transcript` resolves beside this manifest. See Docs/eval-labelling.md.

labels.note: The headline value case: handwritten Mandelson->Lammy note. Source text layer ~3 chars; tesseract recovers almost nothing.
Printed cover email captured as a scan (no text layer) — a printed-text-on-scan recognition floor.
Degraded Thai scan — exercises the Thai recogniser + Typhoon reader. Transcribe in Thai (Unicode, NFC).
Rotated page — exercises rotation-aware reading order. Verify which page is the rotated one and adjust `page` if needed.
Redacted scan (1 page). Mark blacked-out spans as [REDACTED] in the transcript so recall isn't penalised for unreadable ink.
